controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the master direction - reserve bank of india (credit derivatives) directions, 2022
controls.control_description:
(i) These Directions shall be called the Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India
(Credit Derivatives) Directions, 2022.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the master direction - reserve bank of india (credit derivatives) directions, 2022

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to credit derivatives transactions undertaken in over- the-counter (otc) markets and on recognised stock exchanges in india
controls.control_description:
(ii) These Directions shall apply to credit derivatives transactions undertaken in Over-
the-Counter (OTC) markets and on recognised stock exchanges in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to credit derivatives transactions undertaken in over- the-counter (otc) markets and on recognised stock exchanges in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force on may 09, 2022
controls.control_description: (iii) These Directions shall come into force on May 09, 2022.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force on may 09, 2022

controls.control_objective: To ensure a settlement process in which the price of the reference/deliverable obligation at which the settlement will happen is determined through an auction m
controls.control_description:
(a) 'Auction settlement' of CDS means a settlement process in which the price of
the reference/deliverable obligation at which the settlement will happen is
determined through an auction mechanism.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a settlement process in which the price of the reference/deliverable obligation at which the settlement will happen is determined through an auction m

controls.control_objective: To ensure a settlement process in which the protection seller pays to the protection buyer, the notional amount of the cds contract less the expected recovery v
controls.control_description:
(b) 'Cash settlement' of CDS means a settlement process in which the protection
seller pays to the protection buyer, the notional amount of the CDS contract
less the expected recovery value of the reference obligation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a settlement process in which the protection seller pays to the protection buyer, the notional amount of the cds contract less the expected recovery v

controls.control_objective: To ensure an entity that interposes itself between counterparties to contracts traded in one or more financial markets, becoming <image> the buyer to every sell
controls.control_description:
(c) 'Central counterparty' means an entity that interposes itself between
counterparties to contracts traded in one or more financial markets, becoming
<image>
the buyer to every seller and the seller to every buyer and thereby ensuring the
performance of open contracts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an entity that interposes itself between counterparties to contracts traded in one or more financial markets, becoming <image> the buyer to every sell

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(20) of the companies act, 2013 (18 of 2013)
controls.control_description:
(d) 'Company' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in Section 2(20) of
the Companies Act, 2013 (18 of 2013).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(20) of the companies act, 2013 (18 of 2013)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be specified by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
(e) 'Corporate bonds and debentures' mean non-convertible debt securities which
create or acknowledge indebtedness and include debentures, bonds and such
other securities issued by a body corporate or a trust or any statutory body
constituted by virtue of a legislation, whether constituting a charge on the
assets of the issuer or not, but excludes money market debt instruments,
security receipts, securitized debt instruments and bonds issued by the Central
Government or a State Government, or such other persons as may be
specified by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be specified by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure a credit derivative contract in which one counterparty (protection seller) commits to pay to the other counterparty (protection buyer) in the case of
controls.control_description:
(f) 'Credit Default Swap (CDS)' means a credit derivative contract in which one
counterparty (protection seller) commits to pay to the other counterparty
(protection buyer) in the case of a credit event with respect to a reference entity
and in return, the protection buyer makes periodic payments (premium) to the
protection seller until the maturity of the contract or the credit event, whichever
is earlier.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a credit derivative contract in which one counterparty (protection seller) commits to pay to the other counterparty (protection buyer) in the case of

controls.control_objective: To ensure a derivative contract whose value is derived from the credit risk of an underlying debt instrument
controls.control_description:
(g) 'Credit derivative' means a derivative contract whose value is derived from the
credit risk of an underlying debt instrument.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a derivative contract whose value is derived from the credit risk of an underlying debt instrument

controls.control_objective: To ensure a pre-defined event in a credit derivative contract, which triggers a settlement under the contract
controls.control_description:
(h) 'Credit event' means a pre-defined event in a credit derivative contract, which
triggers a settlement under the contract.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a pre-defined event in a credit derivative contract, which triggers a settlement under the contract

controls.control_objective: To ensure a debt instrument issued by the reference entity that the protection buyer can deliver to the protection seller in a physically settled cds contract
controls.control_description:
(i) 'Deliverable obligation' means a debt instrument issued by the reference entity
that the protection buyer can deliver to the protection seller in a physically
settled CDS contract, in case of occurrence of a credit event.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a debt instrument issued by the reference entity that the protection buyer can deliver to the protection seller in a physically settled cds contract

controls.control_objective: To ensure any event that results in the reference obligation being replaced by another obligation issued by the reference entity
controls.control_description:

controls.control_objective: To ensure any event that results in the reference entity no longer being the primary obligor for the reference obligation
controls.control_description:

controls.control_description:

controls.control_description:
(i) Market-makers and users may undertake transactions in single-name CDS
contracts.

to the receipt of approval for acting as a market-maker, it shall cease to act as a
market-maker.

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to meet all its obligations under the existing contracts till the maturity/termination of such contracts
controls.control_description:
The NBFC, SPD or HFC shall continue to meet all its obligations
under the existing contracts till the maturity/termination of such contracts.

(iii) At least one of the parties to a credit derivative transaction shall be a market-maker
or a central counterparty authorised by the Reserve Bank for the purpose.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified by market-makers either as retail or non-retail for the purpose of offering credit derivative contracts
controls.control_description:
(i) Users shall be classified by market-makers either as retail or non-retail for the
purpose of offering credit derivative contracts.

controls.control_description: (ii) The following users shall be eligible to be classified as non-retail users:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified as a retail user
controls.control_description:
(iii) Any user who is not eligible to be classified as a non-retail user shall be classified as
a retail user.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as a retail user

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option to get classified as a retail user
controls.control_description:
(iv) Any user who is otherwise eligible to be classified as a non-retail user shall have the
option to get classified as a retail user.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the option to get classified as a retail user

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to buy protection only for the purpose of hedging
controls.control_description: (i) Retail users shall be allowed to buy protection only for the purpose of hedging.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to buy protection only for the purpose of hedging

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to buy protection for hedging or otherwise
controls.control_description: (ii) Non-retail users shall be allowed to buy protection for hedging or otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to buy protection for hedging or otherwise

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to act as protection sellers:
controls.control_description: (iii) The following non-retail users shall be eligible to act as protection sellers:

Funds mentioned under Paragraph 6(iii) shall be permitted to act as protection
sellers subject to approval of their respective regulator.

shall not be permitted
as reference obligations.

controls.control_description: (v) The reference obligation/deliverable obligation shall be in dematerialised form.

controls.control_objective: To ensure enter into cds transactions if the reference entity is a related party to either the protection buyer or the protection seller
controls.control_description:
(i) Market participants shall not enter into CDS transactions if the reference entity is a
related party to either the protection buyer or the protection seller.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enter into cds transactions if the reference entity is a related party to either the protection buyer or the protection seller

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as related parties for the purpose of these directions
controls.control_description:
However, two (or
more) government-related entities shall not be deemed as related parties for the
purpose of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as related parties for the purpose of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure establish appropriate controls to ensure that transactions with related parties are carried out on an arm's length basis
controls.control_description:
Market-makers shall establish appropriate controls to
ensure that transactions with related parties are carried out on an arm's length
basis.

controls.control_objective: To ensure buy/sell protection on reference entities if there are regulatory restrictions on such participants assuming similar exposures in the cash market or i
controls.control_description:

regulatory restrictions on such participants assuming similar exposures in the cash
market or in violation of any other regulatory restriction, as may be applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to buy/sell protection on reference entities if there are regulatory restrictions on such participants assuming similar exposures in the cash market or i

controls.control_objective: To ensure devise standard master agreement/s for the indian cds market which shall, inter-alia, include credit event definitions and settlement procedures
controls.control_description:
(i) Fixed Income Money Market and Derivatives Association of India (FIMMDA), in
consultation with market participants and based on international best practices,
shall devise standard master agreement/s for the Indian CDS market which shall,
inter-alia, include credit event definitions and settlement procedures.

controls.control_objective: To ensure report all otc cds transactions within 30 minutes of the transaction, to the trade repository of clearing corporation of india ltd
controls.control_description:

transaction, to the trade repository of Clearing Corporation of India Ltd.

controls.control_objective: To ensure report all unwinding, novation, settlement transactions, and any credit, substitution or succession event to the trade repository of ccil

any credit, substitution or succession event to the trade repository of CCIL.

controls.control_objective: To ensure set up a credit derivatives determinations committee, consisting of market-makers and users in credit derivatives as voting members

market-makers and users in credit derivatives as voting members.

may also include central counterparties as observer members and

participants, shall make factual determinations regarding key provisions of credit
derivative contracts including, but not limited to, the occurrence of a credit event,
substitution event, succession event, determining the identity of successor
reference entity, etc.

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in consultation with market participants, develop a standard procedure for cash settlement of cds contracts
controls.control_description:
(iv) The Credit Derivatives Determinations Committee shall, in consultation with market
participants, develop a standard procedure for cash settlement of CDS contracts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in consultation with market participants, develop a standard procedure for cash settlement of cds contracts

controls.control_objective: To ensure conduct an auction to determine the reference price for settlement of cds contracts
controls.control_description:
(v) The Credit Derivatives Determinations Committee, when approached by market
participants, may conduct an auction to determine the reference price for
settlement of CDS contracts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conduct an auction to determine the reference price for settlement of cds contracts

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place procedures/safeguards to ensure that the reference price is determined in a fair and transparent manner
controls.control_description:
In case an auction is conducted, the Credit
Derivatives Determinations Committee shall put in place procedures/safeguards to
ensure that the reference price is determined in a fair and transparent manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place procedures/safeguards to ensure that the reference price is determined in a fair and transparent manner

controls.control_objective: To ensure be binding on the market participants
controls.control_description:
(vi) The decisions of the Credit Derivatives Determinations Committee shall be binding
on the market participants.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be binding on the market participants

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer standardised single-name cds contracts with guaranteed settlement
controls.control_description:
(i) Exchanges may offer standardised single-name CDS contracts with guaranteed
settlement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer standardised single-name cds contracts with guaranteed settlement

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain prior approval of the reserve bank for product design, changes in product design, eligible participants and other details of cds contracts
controls.control_description:
(ii) Exchanges shall obtain prior approval of the Reserve Bank for product design,
changes in product design, eligible participants and other details of CDS contracts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain prior approval of the reserve bank for product design, changes in product design, eligible participants and other details of cds contracts

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the participants on exchanges are made adequately aware of the risks associated with cds
controls.control_description:
(iii) Exchanges shall ensure that the participants on exchanges are made adequately
aware of the risks associated with CDS.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the participants on exchanges are made adequately aware of the risks associated with cds

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as specified under paragraph 7 of these directions
controls.control_description:
(iv) The reference entities and reference obligations for exchange-traded CDS shall be
as specified under Paragraph 7 of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as specified under paragraph 7 of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake transactions in exchange-traded cds only for hedging and such users
controls.control_description:
(v) Participants who are retail users, as defined under Paragraph 5.2 of these
Directions, shall undertake transactions in exchange-traded CDS only for hedging
and such users
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake transactions in exchange-traded cds only for hedging and such users

controls.control_objective: To ensure buy a cds contract(s) for notional amount higher than the face value of the reference obligation held by them
controls.control_description:
(b) shall not buy a CDS contract(s) for notional amount higher than the face value
of the reference obligation held by them;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to buy a cds contract(s) for notional amount higher than the face value of the reference obligation held by them

controls.control_objective: To ensure buy/sell protection on reference entities if there are regulatory restrictions on assuming similar exposures in the cash market or in violation of any
controls.control_description:
(vi) Participants shall not buy/sell protection on reference entities if there are regulatory
restrictions on assuming similar exposures in the cash market or in violation of any
other regulatory restriction, as may be applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to buy/sell protection on reference entities if there are regulatory restrictions on assuming similar exposures in the cash market or in violation of any

controls.control_objective: To ensure be determined by the credit derivatives determinations committee as specified under paragraph 9 of these directions
controls.control_description:
The procedure for cash settlement and auction settlement shall be
determined by the Credit Derivatives Determinations Committee as specified under
Paragraph 9 of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be determined by the credit derivatives determinations committee as specified under paragraph 9 of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to exchange-traded cds contracts
controls.control_description:
(viii) The determinations made by Credit Derivatives Determinations Committee shall be
applicable to exchange-traded CDS contracts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to exchange-traded cds contracts

controls.control_objective: To ensure transact in exchange-traded cds as protection sellers and/or protection buyers
controls.control_description:
(ix) Foreign Portfolio Investors (FPIs) may transact in exchange-traded CDS as
protection sellers and/or protection buyers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to transact in exchange-traded cds as protection sellers and/or protection buyers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the provisions of a
controls.control_description:
Participation by FPIs shall be subject to
the provisions of A.P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the provisions of a

controls.control_objective: To ensure report the gross notional amount of protection sold by fpis to ccil on a daily basis by the end of the day, or on an intra-day basis if required by th
controls.control_description:
Exchanges shall report the gross notional amount of
protection sold by FPIs to CCIL on a daily basis by the end of the day, or on an
intra-day basis if required by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report the gross notional amount of protection sold by fpis to ccil on a daily basis by the end of the day, or on an intra-day basis if required by th

controls.control_objective: To ensure report all cds transactions to the trade repository authorised for the purpose by the reserve bank on a daily basis by the end of the day, in the form
controls.control_description:
(x) Exchanges shall report all CDS transactions to the trade repository authorised for
the purpose by the Reserve Bank on a daily basis by the end of the day, in the form
and manner prescribed by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report all cds transactions to the trade repository authorised for the purpose by the reserve bank on a daily basis by the end of the day, in the form

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish any information relating to cds transactions to the reserve bank or any other agency as may be specified by the reserve bank in the manner and
controls.control_description:
(xi) Exchanges shall furnish any information relating to CDS transactions to the
Reserve Bank or any other agency as may be specified by the Reserve Bank in the
manner and format and within the time frame as may be specified by the Reserve
Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish any information relating to cds transactions to the reserve bank or any other agency as may be specified by the reserve bank in the manner and

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place appropriate and robust methodologies for marking to market credit derivative contracts
controls.control_description:
(i) Market-makers shall put in place appropriate and robust methodologies for marking
to market credit derivative contracts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place appropriate and robust methodologies for marking to market credit derivative contracts

controls.control_objective: To ensure use the daily cds curve published by fimmda or any other benchmark recommended by fimmda, or a proprietary model, to value their cds positions
controls.control_description:
(ii) Market-makers shall use the daily CDS curve published by FIMMDA or any other
benchmark recommended by FIMMDA, or a proprietary model, to value their CDS
positions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use the daily cds curve published by fimmda or any other benchmark recommended by fimmda, or a proprietary model, to value their cds positions

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose the valuation as per the proprietary model, including the rationale for using that model and an explanation of the valuation methodology in t
controls.control_description:
(iii) Market-makers using their proprietary model for valuing the CDS positions shall
disclose the valuation as per the proprietary model, including the rationale for using
that model and an explanation of the valuation methodology in the Notes to
Accounts in their financial statements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose the valuation as per the proprietary model, including the rationale for using that model and an explanation of the valuation methodology in t

controls.control_objective: To ensure also include the valuation as per the cds curve published by fimmda or a benchmark recommended by fimmda
controls.control_description:
The disclosure shall also include the
valuation as per the CDS curve published by FIMMDA or a benchmark
recommended by FIMMDA.2
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also include the valuation as per the cds curve published by fimmda or a benchmark recommended by fimmda

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the applicable prudential norms and capital adequacy requirements for credit derivatives issued by their respective regulators
controls.control_description:
(i) Market participants shall follow the applicable prudential norms and capital
adequacy requirements for credit derivatives issued by their respective regulators.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow the applicable prudential norms and capital adequacy requirements for credit derivatives issued by their respective regulators

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per notified and applicable accounting standards read with regulatory guidelines/instructions issued by the respective regulators
controls.control_description:
(ii) The accounting of credit derivative contracts by market participants shall be as per
notified and applicable accounting standards read with regulatory
guidelines/instructions issued by the respective regulators.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be as per notified and applicable accounting standards read with regulatory guidelines/instructions issued by the respective regulators

controls.control_objective: To ensure be followed in this regard
controls.control_description:
In case the notified
applicable accounting standards or the respective regulator have not prescribed the
accounting treatment for credit derivative contracts, guidance, if any, issued by the
Institute of Chartered Accountants of India shall be followed in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be followed in this regard

controls.control_objective: To ensure be effective once fimmda starts publishing the cds curve or recommends a valuation benchmark
controls.control_description:
(i) The Reserve Bank may call for any information or statement or seek any
clarification, which in the opinion of the Reserve Bank is relevant, from persons or
agencies dealing in credit derivatives contracts, including eligible participants, and

2 The requirement to disclose valuation as per the CDS curve published by FIMMDA or a benchmark recommended by FIMMDA shall be effective once FIMMDA starts publishing the CDS curve or recommends a valuation benchmark.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be effective once fimmda starts publishing the cds curve or recommends a valuation benchmark

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish such information, statement or clarification in the manner and format and within the time frame as may be specified by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
<image>
such persons, agencies and participants shall furnish such information, statement
or clarification in the manner and format and within the time frame as may be
specified by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish such information, statement or clarification in the manner and format and within the time frame as may be specified by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure in public interest, publish any anonymised data related to transactions in credit derivatives market
controls.control_description:
(i) The Reserve Bank, or any other person or agency authorised by the Reserve Bank,
may in public interest, publish any anonymised data related to transactions in credit
derivatives market.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in public interest, publish any anonymised data related to transactions in credit derivatives market

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in addition to taking any penal or regulatory action in accordance with law, disallow that person or agency from dealing in the credit derivatives m
controls.control_description:
(i) In the event of any person or agency violating any provision of these Directions or
the provisions of any other applicable law, the Reserve Bank may, in addition to
taking any penal or regulatory action in accordance with law, disallow that person
or agency from dealing in the credit derivatives market for a period not exceeding
one month at a time, after providing reasonable opportunity to the person or agency
to defend its actions, and such action will be made public by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in addition to taking any penal or regulatory action in accordance with law, disallow that person or agency from dealing in the credit derivatives m

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to all credit derivative transactions entered into from the date the directions come into effect
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall apply to all credit derivative transactions entered into from
the date the Directions come into effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to all credit derivative transactions entered into from the date the directions come into effect
